//: Foundation-kit hook wiring. Copy to .claude/settings.json. $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR resolves to the repo root at hook time, so this file is portable across machines. All hook logic lives in .claude/hooks/*.sh scripts (each reads the tool input JSON from stdin — jq preferred, sed fallback — and reports loudly instead of failing silent). Autoformat defaults to Python/ruff — swap the case in autoformat.sh for prettier/gofmt/rustfmt as appropriate.

hooks.//: Scans the branch diff for leaked secrets before a push or PR-create. The script itself inspects the stdin tool input and exits 0 for any other Bash command; exit 2 on a finding blocks the tool call.
